'''tawasa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mycophile|mycophile]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-w-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mycophile|mycophile]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| tawasa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:tæwæsæth|tæwæsæth]] || [[word:tæwæsæj|tæwæsæj]] || [[word:tæwæsæsh|tæwæsæsh]] || [[word:tæwæsæ|tæwæsæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:tawawasath|tawawasath]] || [[word:tawawasaj|tawawasaj]] || [[word:tawawasash|tawawasash]] || [[word:tawawasa|tawawasa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tawasath|tawasath]] || [[word:tawasaj|tawasaj]] || [[word:tawasash|tawasash]] || [[word:tawasa|tawasa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tawafsath|tawafsath]] || [[word:tawafsaj|tawafsaj]] || [[word:tawafsash|tawafsash]] || [[word:tawafsaf|tawafsaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:tawasatha|tawasatha]] || [[word:tawasaja|tawasaja]] || [[word:tawasasha|tawasasha]] || [[word:tawasaka|tawasaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:tawasath|tawasath]] || [[word:tawasaj|tawasaj]] || [[word:tawasash|tawasash]] || [[word:tawasa|tawasa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:tawasathal|tawasathal]] || [[word:tawasajal|tawasajal]] || [[word:tawasashal|tawasashal]] || [[word:tawasakal|tawasakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:tawasathatha|tawasathatha]] || [[word:tawasajaja|tawasajaja]] || [[word:tawasashasha|tawasashasha]] || [[word:tawasaka|tawasaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:tawasathan|tawasathan]] || [[word:tawasajan|tawasajan]] || [[word:tawasashan|tawasashan]] || [[word:tawasakan|tawasakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:tawasathaoro|tawasathaoro]] || [[word:tawasajaoro|tawasajaoro]] || [[word:tawasashaoro|tawasashaoro]] || [[word:tawasakaoro|tawasakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d2c7592}}
